title: WKD Common Types
description: Foundational $defs for all primitive and composite types shared across every domain schema. No domain-specific logic lives here — only reusable building blocks.

Email.description: RFC 5321 email address — stored lowercase by all models

PhoneNumber.description: Contact phone number — local South African or international format (no normalization enforced at schema level)

Money.description: South African Rand (ZAR) monetary amount — must be non-negative. Stored as a plain number (cents not used).

VatRate.description: VAT percentage rate — default is 15% (South African standard rate)

Address.description: Structured South African postal address — all fields optional at schema level; individual endpoints declare which are required

siteAddressDetail.description: Unit, floor, or other access detail

cityDistrict.description: City or metro district (e.g. Cape Town, eThekwini)

GeoLocation.description: WGS-84 geographic coordinate pair — used for agent live location tracking

PaginationQuery.description: Standard query parameters for paginated list endpoints

sort.description: Sort field — prefix with - for descending (e.g. -createdAt)

LineItem.description: Individual billable line on a quotation or invoice

UserRole.description: RBAC role — determines feature access and field-level permissions

CustomerType.description: Customer classification — drives profile view, field validation, and parent/child account rules

AgentAvailability.description: Field service agent current dispatch availability

ServiceSpecialization.description: Service trade categorization — used to match agents to jobs

EquipmentType.description: Equipment category — drives service type routing and specialization matching

PaymentMethod.description: Payment method used for invoice settlement

PartsFulfilmentMode.description: How parts were sourced — affects profitability analysis and delivery cost fields

QuotationStatus.description: Lifecycle state of a quotation. Terminal states: approved (→ converts to ServiceCall), rejected, expired.

InvoiceWorkflowStatus.description: Pro-forma and invoice approval workflow state

InvoiceDocumentType.description: Whether the billing document is a pro-forma draft or a finalized tax invoice

EndpointDescriptor.description: Machine-readable contract descriptor for a single API endpoint. Referenced in each domain's 'endpoints' array.

operationId.description: Unique camelCase identifier — matches the controller export function name

path.description: Express-style path relative to the server root (e.g. /api/customers/:id)

access.description: Access policy label — detail is in auth.policy.json

roles.description: Required when access is 'role-restricted'. Lists permitted roles.

summary.description: One-line human description of what this endpoint does

requestBodyRef.description: $defs key within this domain schema that describes the request body shape (e.g. 'CreateCustomerRequest')

responses.description: HTTP status code (as string key) → $defs key in shared/responses.json

notes.description: Implementation notes — immutable field rules, side-effects, emitted events, etc.
